transcript.text:
[Tzuyang's live stream]
[28,000 viewers?!]
[Let's eat some Daechang (beef large intestines)]
[With Cheese Fire Chicken Noodles]
I'm going to set this up nicely
[Nicely...]
[Nicely...?]
[Black Daechang]
[28,000 angry viewers]
It's edible... right? Let's try it
[What's with her...?]
[Will she be able to finish this mukbang successfully...?]
Hello everyone
For today... It's not cooked yet
3kgs of daechang (beef large intestines) And cheese fire chicken noodles
I prepared cup noodles because it's convenient

And scallion kimchi
I'm going to cook and set it up nicely
Let's get cooking
Viewer: Why's the cat always over there?
He likes that spot
He only likes to sit there when I do mukbangs
[Let's grill!]
It's edible... right?
I'll be fine It won't kill me
[Is that really okay...?]
[Filled]
Don't burn!
[Something doesn't smell right...]
[Viewers mad about the burnt daechang]
[Is it ruined...?]
It never goes right whenever I try to cook

It's really ruined
I'll cook the noodles
[Pour the hot water in~]
[Koreans love it fastforwarded]
Finished! Finally
Bon appetit
[Tzu-fuel time!]
Daechang! Let's try it now
With some daechang sauce
It's cooked well
Really chewy Savory and delicious
[Scallion kimchi]
[This is it!]
The restaurants will serve it like this upon request
It's supposed to be cut into small pieces
So if you don't, it's really hard to cook it

[This is the right size]
Daechang and fire chicken noodles This combo is going to be great
Yummy
The cheese one is still spicy
[Some daechang]
[Some scallion kimchi]
[And some fire chicken noodles]
[It's not all ruined]
Jingu~
[Did you call me?]
He answered
The inside just feels like pure grease
Not even like fat, but just grease
It can get a little too greasy, but it's savory
The outer layer is chewy
I didn't really like it at first, but it's very addicting

Right, beef grease
You know when you eat beef and you can taste the grease
It's very similar to that taste
This is edible, right?
I won't eat it if it tastes too burnt
[Scared Jingu]
[She scared herself]
[Get a hold of yourself!]
That's so good!
It doesn't taste burnt It's tasty
I just read something in the chat that was hilarious
[Is that Kimbap?] (Korean seaweed roll)
[She loved the joke]
It was already cooked at the restaurant
[Making excuses as to why she burnt some of them]
I don't have enough noodles here That's why I'm eating little by little

I should've bought more
Spicy That's spicy
[Total chaos]
Viewer: I turned on the water chicken noodles on the fire because of your mukbang
[Viewer: She must be drunk] No, I didn't drink
[Rolled up the daechang with noodles]
[Noodles quickly disappearing]
Wait a min...
I can cook daechang on this, right?
Since it has a lot of grease already
Let's spread it out
And cut them into small pieces now
That's cooked well
It might look burnt, but it's tasty
That's so good
The sauce?

It has onions and chili peppers
It has a sweet & sour flavor just like any other beef sauce
Sweet & sour sauce goes well daechang because it's greasy
I ate all the scallion kimchi What now?
That's why I have chives here
[She's well prepared today]
That's delicious
It goes so well with chives
Who made daechang?
It's so good
It's so good This restaurant knows how it's done
I'm not sick of the same taste
It's hard for some people to eat this because of its greasiness
If that's the case, I recommend the daechang rice
You can have raw egg on top of the daechang rice for double the savory
I wish I had some egg yolk right now

It might not be pleasant for first-timers
It might feel like rubber at first
But once you bite into that, it has this soft fat-like grease inside
Soft grease...?
Some parts of tough to chew Some are not
There's this one part that's crispy
This one is not crispy
Chewy
With some consistency
Viewer: Gopchang, Daechang, Makchang?
Gopchang for sure (beef small intestines)
Gopchang filled with fat inside
With a soft outer layer
[Proceeds to interact with chat as she eats]
It's not filling me up
Not at all

I'm at about 30~40%
Last piece...
[Cheese Fire Chicken Noodles & 3kgs of Daechang CLEAR]
Dessert? I have some ice cream
[Time for some dessert]
The yellow one is better French vanilla
It's almost like coffee
[Even the ice cream is gone in 1 bite...]
Hi
I used to eat this ice cream a lot Chocolate covered vanilla
Also this one
People still eat that
[Interacting with chat as she devours the ice cream]
That was good
[What are you looking at?]
His facial expressions

[Let's bring Jingu up close]
[Yes, that's it... That's the spot!]
Look He never likes to lose
[Playing with Jingu is so fun]
[Some more Q&A with chat]
It's time for me to go
Bye
Goodnight everyone!
[See you next time!] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
